mapper.select: select usd.shop_id as shopId, usd.user_id as userId, usd.shop_name as shopName, usd.shop_type as shopType, usd.shop_status as shopStatus, usd.logo_url as logoUrl, usd.create_time as createTime, u.shop_desc as shopDesc, u.business_hours as businessHours, u.contact_phone as contactPhone, u.contact_email as contactEmail, u.address as address from user_shop_display usd inner join user_shop_extend u on usd.shop_id=u.shop_id where usd.shop_id=#{shopId}

select usd.shop_id as shopId, usd.user_id as userId, usd.shop_name as shopName, usd.shop_type as shopType, usd.shop_status as shopStatus, usd.logo_url as logoUrl, usd.create_time as createTime, u.shop_desc as shopDesc, u.business_hours as businessHours, u.contact_phone as contactPhone, u.contact_email as contactEmail, u.address as address from user_shop_display usd inner join user_shop_extend u on usd.shop_id=u.shop_id where usd.shop_status=2 order by usd.create_time desc limit #{startIndex},#{pageSize}
